mug.description: A mug-like object is usually described by its handle, opening, and bottom.

usb.description: USB placement often distinguishes the plug end and the larger body end.

apple.description: Fruit upright placement is usually described by its top and bottom.

bottle.description: Bottle-like objects are often described by cap, top, and bottom.

binder.description: Flat office objects are commonly described by the larger face or spine.

binder clips.description: Binder clips are usually referenced by the clip side or the wire handle.

book.description: Books are commonly described by cover orientation or spine direction.

mobile phone.description: Phones are usually oriented by screen, top edge, or back side.

knife.description: Knives are typically oriented by blade direction and handle.

pitcher base.description: Pitcher-like objects are usually described by handle and opening.

organizer.description: Organizer placement often references front/opening or bottom.
